EC: Ice-capped volcanoes rise inland; mangrove fringe on Pacific tidal mudflats
EE: Baltic skerries on till; inland acid bogs between drumlins and kettle lakes
EG: Fluvial oasis between sand seas; limestone plateaus east to a tideless Mediterranean shore
ER: Red Sea arid margin; coastal plain rising to interior plateau and rift-facing scarps
ES: High interior meseta cut by entrenched rivers; glacial cirques on northern granite ranges
ET: Rift-shoulder basalt plateaus; afroalpine moor on summits above mist forest belts
FI: Granite skerries; kettle lakes on till; bogs and eskers across boreal shield country
FJ: Volcanic ridges under clouds; barrier reef passes dropping to deep offshore slopes
FM: Coral atolls on ocean rises; reef rims around lagoons and broad tidal flats
FR: Granite moorlands west; chalk scarps east; inland limestone causses and karst poljes
GA: Humid lowland rainforest; interior basement scarps with braided upland streams
GB: Glacial trough lakes in Paleozoic moors; drumlins on northern rolling till plains
GD: Volcanic cones; wet windward ridges and drier leeward hurricane-prone coasts
GE: Fold belts with tight intermontane basins; snowmelt gorges in banded limestones
GH: Coastal lagoon bars; inland forest scarps stepping to dry-season savanna northward
GL: Calving glaciers in long fjords; bare gneiss forelands with tundra polygon soils
GM: River trench across savanna; mangrove estuary mudflats and winding tidal creeks
GN: Dissected sandstone plateaus; mangrove estuaries on a humid Atlantic margin
GQ: Volcanic island peaks in wet tropics; mainland jungle under equatorial rainfall
GR: Drowned archipelago shelves; karst islands with poljes and sheer calcareous cliffs
GT: Pacific volcanic cones; interior karst poljes on folded limestone plateaus
GW: Mangrove archipelagos in wide estuaries; tidal mudflats on lateritic lowlands
GY: Sandstone tablelands on old shield; interior savanna between dissected escarpments
HK: Steep granite harbor walls; towers on narrow marine terraces by tidal channels
HN: Pacific pine highlands; Caribbean lowlands; humid cloud forest on the central divide
